存在/しないあなた、と私 (You and I, Existing/Non-existing)

A mysterious psychological narrative game where you explore fragmented memories and conversations with a girl who may or may not exist. Navigate through branching dialogue trees by making choices that shape your reality. Uncover hidden truths by experiencing different story paths, each revealing pieces of a larger mystery. Complete all major story branches to discover the ultimate truth about existence and your connection to the mysterious girl.

Controls:
Arrow Keys (UP/DOWN): Navigate between dialogue choices
SPACE: Advance dialogue text / Confirm choice
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to title screen

存在/しないあなた、と私 (You and I, Existing/Non-existing)

A mysterious psychological narrative game where you explore fragmented memories and conversations with a girl who may or may not exist. Navigate through branching dialogue trees by making choices that shape your reality. Uncover hidden truths by experiencing different story paths, each revealing pieces of a larger mystery. Complete all major story branches to discover the ultimate truth about existence and your connection to the mysterious girl.

Controls:
Arrow Keys (UP/DOWN): Navigate between dialogue choices
SPACE: Advance dialogue text / Confirm choice
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to title screen
